_meta.description: Acoustic material database for RLR / pyroomacoustics. Each material has 4 octave bands (125, 500, 2000, 8000 Hz) of absorption α, one scattering coefficient s, and 4-band transmission τ. Values sourced from Vorländer 2008 'Auralization' materials database or standard architectural acoustics tables.
_meta.reference: Vorländer, M. (2008). Auralization: Fundamentals of Acoustics, Modelling, Simulation, Algorithms and Acoustic Virtual Reality. Springer.
_meta.usage: shoebox_v2_spec.json.surfaces.* and shoebox_v2_spec.json.furniture[].material reference the keys here.

drywall_painted.description: Painted gypsum drywall over stud (standard interior wall).

fabric_upholstery.description: Fabric-covered sofa (upholstered furniture). High mid/high-freq absorption. Some transmission for sound sneaking through.

leather_upholstery.description: Leather-covered sofa. Lower absorption than fabric. Kept for future material sweep.

carpet_thick.description: Thick pile carpet on concrete. Kept for future room material sweep.

concrete_bare.description: Bare concrete surface (very reflective). Kept for future room material sweep.

glass_window.description: Standard 6mm window glass. Some transmission modeled (single-pane).
